name: optimization_agent
description: Optimizes order quantities and selects the best suppliers considering purchase, ordering, and holding costs, while strictly enforcing warehouse storage capacity constraints.

capabilities.name: optimize_inventory
capabilities.description: Optimize supplier selection and order quantities for items recommended for reorder, applying Lagrange-multiplier-based warehouse capacity adjustments.

data_path.description: Path to the inventory recommendations CSV file (e.g. data/processed/inventory_recommendations.csv)

output_path.description: Path to save optimized recommendations CSV (e.g. data/processed/optimized_inventory.csv)

optimization_summary.description: Summary metrics including total items optimized, total ordering costs, total capacity violations resolved, and cost savings.

output_path.description: Path where the optimized recommendations CSV is saved
